ignorePatterns.comment: Apparently UA-filtering markdown-link-check; returns status 0 to the action even though curl from a normal client gets 200. Verified manually.
Cloudflare in front of cppreference 403s the link-check user agent; the URLs work for any browser. Verified manually.
Stack Exchange UA-filters automated link checkers to 403.
linux.die.net man-page mirror 403s automated UAs. Original man-pages are reachable; flagging would force us to drop canonical man-page references.
